message:
fix(runtime): Use std.mem.eql for string comparison in tuple contains

Fixed container_dispatch.contains() to use std.mem.eql(u8, ...) for
string slice comparison instead of == operator, which doesn't work
for []const u8 in Zig.

This fixes compile errors when checking if a string is in a tuple
of strings, e.g., `lit in ("0_7", "09_99")` in Python.

Also improved fallback slice handling to return correct void slice
types for unknown container types.
